npm install -g laravel-schemify

Laravel
Schemify

Reverse-engineer your database into
ready-to-run Laravel migrations — instantly.

MySQL PostgreSQL SSH Tunnel Interactive CLI Laravel 9+
~ laravel-project
$ npx laravel-schemify
✔ Use database config from .env? Yes
✔ Output directory ./database/migrations
✔ Tables ALL
✔  Connected · Found 12 tables
✔ Generated: ..._create_users_table.php
✔ Generated: ..._create_posts_table.php
✔ Generated: ..._create_orders_table.php
··· 9 more files
✔  12 migrations written in 3s
